query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[0].pexelsQuery') as s1, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[1].pexelsQuery') as s2, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[2].pexelsQuery') as s3, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[3].pexelsQuery') as s4, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[4].pexelsQuery') as s5, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[5].pexelsQuery') as s6 FROM videoScripts ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[0].pexelsQuery') as s1, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[1].pexelsQuery') as s2, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[2].pexelsQuery') as s3, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[3].pexelsQuery') as s4, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[4].pexelsQuery') as s5, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[5].pexelsQuery') as s6 FROM videoScripts ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
